name: Beside You
original_name: ข้างกายที่เป็นเธอ
overview: Nine feels like his boyfriend, Tar, might not be the one. After hurting the person who loves him, Nine prays that his next love will be the one. The next morning, he wakes up to find his cat has turned human!

trailers.title: ข้างกายที่เป็นเธอ Beside You  [Official Trailer]
